untranslatable_reason: This signal requires fundamental data (5-year weighted-average sales growth ranking, decile portfolio formation, market regime classification by worst/best monthly returns) and cross-sectional relative ranking across universe of stocks. The allowed indicators are limited to technical price/volume metrics. Required inputs: (1) Historical sales growth data by stock, (2) Decile ranking system across stock universe, (3) Market return regimes (worst-25 vs best-25 months). None of these can be expressed using the available technical indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume ratios, Z-scores, Returns, Bar properties).
translation_notes: This is a cross-sectional, factor-based, regime-dependent signal requiring fundamental ranking and portfolio construction. It cannot be translated into a single-stock technical rule engine. Would require: (a) fundamental data pipeline for sales growth, (b) cross-sectional ranking module, (c) market regime detector based on historical market returns distribution, (d) portfolio-level rather than stock-level execution logic.
